overall.description: A cinematic view of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a Harry Potter video game, showcasing the iconic gothic dining hall with floating candles, long house tables, and students in robes during nighttime.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with floating candles and house dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the Great Hall interior from a fixed vantage point near the entrance

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes standing and conversing in the foreground
student in dark robes walking into frame from the right side midway through the clip

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating magically in the air throughout the hall ceiling
long wooden house tables lined with students and food
tall stained glass windows showing dark night sky outside
stone walls with hanging tapestries and wall sconces
elevated platform at the far end of the hall with a long table

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of the Hogwarts Great Hall at night, illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students in dark robes populate the long house tables while two figures converse in the left foreground. The gothic architecture features high stone walls, large arched windows, and a raised platform at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the atmospheric grandeur of the gothic dining space at night. It begins with a wide view of the hall, where thousands of floating candles cast a warm, flickering glow over the high stone walls and large arched windows. The camera lingers on the long house tables populated by students in dark robes, while two figures engage in conversation in the left foreground. The scene finally draws the eye toward the far end of the room, emphasizing the scale of the architecture and the prominence of the raised platform.
